Email 1 - Hey Please Call Me
Hey drop me a line if you want us to do any of these things for you:
1. Create and manage all of your ads (including YouTube, Facebook, Retargeting, etc.)
2. Find out where your funnel is losing sales and fix it.
3. Build you a super cool follow up system that keeps selling things to your leads.
OR ...
Do any (or all) of those things WITH you.
Here's how to reach me.
(The page there literally has three sentences that describe how this works lol.)
We have a few openings tomorrow.
Go here and check out the Three Sentence Superpage (TM) and call me if you like what you
see.
Frank
P.S. Am I the only one who thinks "Three Sentence Superpage" is hilarious?
Probably.
Anyway - if you want us to handle your marketing, look at this :-)
P.P.S. I sent this exact email almost a week ago. The response was ridiculous. If I had to guess,
it's because:
1. This is what people want. (Always the #1 "thing" when it comes to making an offer work).
2. It's clear and to the point.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

So ...if you're wondering what kind of emails to send to your list, try the ol' "do this if you want
[benefit]" formula.
Like this one.
It can be summed up by "Call me if you want me to handle your marketing you you."
Simple.
Works.
Call me.
Email 2 - %FIRSTNAME%, getting help
Hi %FIRSTNAME%,
Do you have any questions about how [OFFER] works? (Or need help in figuring out if it makes
sense to get [OFFER]?)
We're happy to help you.
Choose a time that works best for you and we'll do a quick one- one-one to help you.
You can do that here :-)
Email 3 - Want me to take care of this for you?
Want me and my team to do your marketing FOR you?
This is what we can do for you:
1. Create and manage all of your ads (including YouTube, Facebook, Retargeting, etc.)
2. Find out where your funnel is losing sales and fix it.
3. Build you a super cool follow up system that keeps selling things to your leads.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

If you're interested, watch this: the shortest "sales pitch" ever.
(The page there literally has three sentences that describe how this works lol.)
Frank
P.S. Most of the time, we can find a way to generate immediate revenue for clients
...therefore paying for ourselves right away. We like to have that campaign built and running
within the first 14 days.
Details here.
The "catch" is we can only do this for existing businesses that have momentum. No startups.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 3 --
